rules.description: Make something no one will ever see. The absence of a viewer removes the performance layer and leaves only the act of making.
rules.process: I made a series of small drawings and immediately sealed them in an envelope. The knowledge that they were hidden changed how freely I moved.

rules.description: Whenever a creative decision causes anxiety, that is the direction to move in. Comfort signals repetition; discomfort signals new territory.
rules.process: I catalogued every moment I hesitated over a decision and then deliberately chose the option I had been avoiding. The results were unpredictable in productive ways.
